title: December 13th, 2021
body:
lyrics

perhaps i'm paranoid but why mark zuckerberg
yeah i'm a bit annoyed another boy preferred
that could be me in the big seat
but the things i've seen put lovecraft to shame
you gonna tell me facebook don't drive you insane
why would i let em dig deeper into my brain
meta
meta peddler
a known meddler
rule molder
controller holder
how far will ya let em
move that horse forward
into your fortress
there are few things i trust less
than the public facing persona
of a social media conglomerate
that's been at war with us
they bombed the internet
and one of them is when you combine all of that
with actual power
that man moves elections
that man caters insurrections
and feeds us our dead with targeted microadgression
it might be regressive for me to say this
but that man needs to be decapitalized
off with his crown
we'll take the flesh in pounds
dollars
impound him if he hollers
break up the compounds
melt the guns down
let there be a power vacuum
right now there's a black hole and it's that dude

reality is earth

humanity is fire

future is air

history is water

and here i'm stuck in the middle with you

the present is human?

spirit

essence

you are here

mall map style

two page spreads with map style icons paired with existential map drawing

p1-2



you are here

p3-4



you are definitely here and not somewhere else



if you look to the left, you see everything you can see and nothing that you can't. what do you see?

look in other directions to enjoy the exact same experience completely differently
